description:
Specification

Product Information

Item Code:N639BZ250806W

Product Type :Combo Item

Product Name:360° rotating bar table (main body 137 x 39 x 90 cm), coffee bar furniture, rotating dining bar with storage, kitchen island, with spice rack, six drawers, open storage space, white

Main Color:White

Main Material:MDF+Metal

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (cm):137.00

Assembled Width (cm):39.00

Assembled Height (cm):90.00

Product Weight (kg):51.77

Package Size

Sub-item 1: N639P328863WPackage Quantity: 192.99 * 49.48 * 20.5 cm 28.18 kg

Sub-item 2: N639P328864WPackage Quantity: 1152.98 * 50.5 * 14.48 cm 28.96 kg

Product Features

  • Product dimensions: The bar table measures 137 cm in length overall and can be extended to 203 cm. It is 39 cm wide and 105 cm tall.
  • Large storage capacity: The side of the bar counter cleverly incorporates a double-layer spice rack for storage functionality. The arch-shaped design is sleek and elegant, with the cabinet featuring six drawers to accommodate daily essentials such as tableware, wineware, and kitchen utensils. The central open space allows for easy access, keeping your home organised and tidy.
  • Rotating side table design: The extendable side table can rotate 360 degrees freely, and the arch-shaped spice rack can accommodate and display various bottles, jars, and containers, meeting the needs of different spaces such as kitchens, living rooms, and study rooms.
  • Durable and sturdy: The drawer handles are made of high-quality metal, which is both aesthetically pleasing and resistant to rust. The cabinet body is made of MDF and PB panels, ensuring durability and ease of cleaning.
  • Design: The drawer doors feature a sleek, modern texture design, perfect for contemporary home decor. The tabletop showcases a wood grain pattern that complements the cabinet body. Whether placed in a corner of the kitchen, study, or living room, it adds a touch of comfort to your daily life.

Descriptions

Product Details

Product Size 137-203*39*90cm(L x W x H)
Product Weight 51.77kg
Material MDF, PB, Metal
load-bearing 60kg
Contents of delivery bar table, assembled parts
Number of packages 2
Country of origin China

Large storage capacity

The side of the bar counter cleverly incorporates a double-layer spice rack for storage functionality. The arch-shaped design is sleek and elegant, with the cabinet featuring six drawers to accommodate daily essentials such as tableware, wineware, and kitchen utensils. The central open space allows for easy access, keeping your home organised and tidy.



Rotating side table design

The extendable side table can rotate 360 degrees freely, and the arch-shaped spice rack can accommodate and display various bottles, jars, and containers, meeting the needs of different spaces such as kitchens, living rooms, and study rooms.

Durable and sturdy

The drawer handles are made of high-quality metal, which is both aesthetically pleasing and resistant to rust. The cabinet body is made of MDF and PB panels, ensuring durability and ease of cleaning.



Design

The drawer doors feature a sleek, modern texture design, perfect for contemporary home decor. The tabletop showcases a wood grain pattern that complements the cabinet body. Whether placed in a corner of the kitchen, study, or living room, it adds a touch of comfort to your daily life.

Product dimensions

The bar table measures 137 cm in length overall and can be extended to 203 cm. It is 39 cm wide and 105 cm tall.
